ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange on which the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date on which the portfolio was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the portfolio manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the portfolio manager */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the portfolio manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned in the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the price is recorded */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector_industry" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry to which the stock belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_industry_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date on which the report was generated */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., portfolio summary, performance report, risk assessment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date on which the alert was generated */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, market event) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock related to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
